auth.label: API Key
auth.description: Tomba API key used with the X-Tomba-Key header. Find or create API credentials in the Tomba API Keys page.

extraFields.label: API Secret
extraFields.description: Tomba API secret used with the X-Tomba-Secret header.

actions.name: domain_search
actions.description: Search for email addresses and company intelligence for a domain.

domain.description: The domain name or website URL to search.

page.description: Optional page number for paginated Tomba results.

limit.description: Optional maximum number of results to request from Tomba.

inputSchema.description: Input for searching email addresses by company domain.

raw.description: The raw JSON payload returned by Tomba.

outputSchema.description: A Tomba API response with the upstream payload preserved.

actions.name: email_count
actions.description: Count known email addresses and related breakdowns for a domain.

domain.description: The domain name to count email addresses for.

inputSchema.description: Input for counting known emails for a domain.

raw.description: The raw JSON payload returned by Tomba.

outputSchema.description: A Tomba API response with the upstream payload preserved.

actions.name: email_finder
actions.description: Find the most likely professional email address for a person at a domain.

inputSchema.description: Input for finding one professional email address by person and company.

raw.description: The raw JSON payload returned by Tomba.

outputSchema.description: A Tomba API response with the upstream payload preserved.

actions.name: email_sources
actions.description: Retrieve public source URLs where Tomba found an email address.

email.description: The email address whose sources should be returned.

inputSchema.description: Input for retrieving public sources for an email.

raw.description: The raw JSON payload returned by Tomba.

outputSchema.description: A Tomba API response with the upstream payload preserved.

actions.name: email_verifier
actions.description: Verify deliverability and metadata for an email address.

inputSchema.description: Input for verifying one email address.

raw.description: The raw JSON payload returned by Tomba.

outputSchema.description: A Tomba API response with the upstream payload preserved.

actions.name: enrich
actions.description: Enrich a known email address with person and company attributes.

inputSchema.description: Input for enriching a known email address.

raw.description: The raw JSON payload returned by Tomba.

outputSchema.description: A Tomba API response with the upstream payload preserved.

actions.name: get_account
actions.description: Retrieve information about the authenticated Tomba account.

inputSchema.description: No input is required for this Tomba action.

anyOf.description: The authenticated account email address when returned by Tomba.
The authenticated Tomba user ID when returned by Tomba.
The authenticated account plan name when available.

actions.name: linkedin
actions.description: Find contact data associated with a public LinkedIn profile URL.

url.description: The public LinkedIn profile URL to search.

inputSchema.description: Input for finding contact data from a LinkedIn URL.

raw.description: The raw JSON payload returned by Tomba.

outputSchema.description: A Tomba API response with the upstream payload preserved.

actions.name: search_companies
actions.description: Search companies with Tomba Reveal using a natural-language query or filters.

query.description: Natural language company search query. Use this on the first request, then reuse filters from the response when needed.

filters.description: Structured Tomba Reveal filters to apply instead of a query.

page.description: Optional page number for paginated company search results.

inputSchema.description: Input for searching companies with Tomba Reveal.

raw.description: The raw JSON payload returned by Tomba.

outputSchema.description: A Tomba API response with the upstream payload preserved.

actions.name: technology
actions.description: Detect technologies and tools used by a company domain.

domain.description: The domain name to inspect for technologies.

inputSchema.description: Input for detecting technologies used by a domain.

raw.description: The raw JSON payload returned by Tomba.

outputSchema.description: A Tomba API response with the upstream payload preserved.
